film.title: Lipstick Under My Burkha
film.overview: Four ordinary women, inflicted by silly societal norms, have to steal, lie, cheat and hide in order to lead the lives that they rightfully deserve.

dialogues.dialogue: Go on! Get me married against my will. Go on! Shameless wretch! Even if gifted a diamond you'll still choose the piece of coal.
Love me again I'm faint with yearning Cure me with your love Rehana! Have you no shame? Such obscenity! Go to your room. Move the camera, mister or I'll slap you.
Will dancing get you good grades? Your father has worked hard to put you into college. Not so you can shame us! Concentrate on your studies. Shameless girl!
dialogues.cause_raw: not focusing on studies and dancing instead

dialogues.dialogue: Your father has worked hard to put you into college. Not so you can shame us! Concentrate on your studies. Shameless girl! The rent is due. The salary transfer from Saudi...Oh, come on! Don't interfere in money matters.
Jeans are my right! My right! There's no end to rules in a girl's life. Don't sing, don't dance you'll shame us. Don't walk like that, people will stare. Keep your eyes down, what will people say‘!
You bought it from a shop‘! Of course not! Got it from the clinic. I thought you've been shameless buying condoms instead of groceries! How could I do such a thing‘!
Hattie! - Thanks! Come, come. Senseless love Shameless love Namrata, about the audition...Pout! I'm sorry! - Ms. Ripped Jeans! What are you drinking?

Father... no, they didn't arrest me. Go home. I'll explain once I'm home. Where are you running off to‘! Shameless girl! Disgracing the family. Locked up inside the police station. What were you protesting against?

You are disowning our identity and heritage. Embarrassed by the very burkha that earns us our daily bread‘! You're ashamed of wearing a burkha! I'm ashamed you are my daughter. - Start looking for a groom for her. - Yes.

Embarrassed by the very burkha that earns us our daily bread‘! You're ashamed of wearing a burkha! I'm ashamed you are my daughter. - Start looking for a groom for her. - Yes. No need to study further.
dialogues.cause_raw: not conforming to traditional clothing norms and prioritizing education over marriage

dialogues.dialogue: Just because you've earned a few cents‘! To talk to you, I have to meet your mistress! Shameless! You're the one who's shameless. Seeing another woman... no job, no salary.
dialogues.cause_raw: being jobless and dependent on a woman

dialogues.dialogue: To talk to you, I have to meet your mistress! Shameless! You're the one who's shameless. Seeing another woman... no job, no salary. You don't care about your family.
Give it to me. - Come outside! Behave yourself...What's all this‘! You should be ashamed of yourself, auntie! So much for her piety! Auntie, you've sullied the family name.
You should be ashamed of yourself, auntie! So much for her piety! Auntie, you've sullied the family name. Shame on you! Look at this. What is this‘! Lewd books, indecent clothes.
dialogues.cause_raw: Indecent behavior and possession of inappropriate items

dialogues.dialogue: A 55-year old widow! Making dirty phone calls to a young boy. Disgusting! - The old woman has no shame. We look up to her as a mother. And see what she's been doing.
dialogues.cause_raw: inappropriate behavior with a young boy

dialogues.dialogue: And see what she's been doing. Getting horny at this age! Shameful! What will you teach our kids‘! What did auntie do‘! - Nothing.
dialogues.cause_raw: sexual desire at an older age
